methodology_sections: 1.1 Asset Inventory - Financial assets, state assets, privilege assets, reputation assets
1.3 System Architecture Mapping - Contract hierarchies, dependencies, upgrade patterns, access control
2.1 Entry Point Enumeration - Public/external functions, callbacks, parameter analysis

financial_assets: ETH held transiently and/or as residual balances in Cred (from share buy payments and batch refunds/payouts)
ETH protocol fees routed from Cred trades to protocolFeeDestination
ETH creator royalties routed from Cred trades to PhiRewards via IPhiRewards.deposit{value:creatorFee}
ETH mint fees collected in PhiFactory.claim/signatureClaim/merkleClaim flows and forwarded to: protocolFeeDestination (protocol portion) and PhiNFT1155 contracts (mint portion)
ETH held in PhiFactory (can accumulate from failed downstream calls or mismatched msg.value usage; owner can withdraw())
ETH held in PhiNFT1155 (receive() enabled; can accumulate from direct sends or refunds not claimed elsewhere)
ETH held in PhiRewards as accounting-backed balances (RewardControl.balanceOf) available for withdrawal
ETH held in CuratorRewardsDistributor per-credId balanceOf[credId] awaiting distribution
ERC1155 NFTs minted by PhiNFT1155 (token supplies and ownership balances)
Royalties configuration (ERC2981-style) affecting downstream marketplace payments
state_assets: Cred.creds[credId] (PhiCred struct: creator, URL, type, verificationType, bondingCurve, timestamps, royalties, currentSupply, latestActiveTimestamp)
Cred.credsMerkeRoot[credId] (Merkle root for MERKLE verification creds)
Cred protocol configuration: phiSignerAddress, protocolFeeDestination, phiRewardsAddress, protocolFeePercent
PhiFactory.arts[artId] (PhiArt struct: cred linkage, verificationType, uri, artAddress, artist, receiver, royalties via NFT contract, maxSupply, mintFee, start/end times, numberMinted, soulBounded)
PhiFactory configuration: phiSignerAddress, protocolFeeDestination, erc1155ArtAddress (implementation for clones), phiRewardsAddress, artCreateFee, mintProtocolFee, artIdCounter
PhiNFT1155: credChainId, credId, verificationType, protocolFeeDestination, name/symbol, phiFactoryContract
CreatorRoyaltiesControl.royalties[tokenId] per-token RoyaltyConfiguration plus default royaltyRecipient and initialized flag
RewardControl: balanceOf[account], nonces[account] for EIP-712 withdrawals
PhiRewards reward parameters: artistReward, referralReward, verifierReward, curateReward, curatorRewardsDistributor address
CuratorRewardsDistributor: balanceOf[credId], withdrawRoyalty parameter, phiRewardsContract and credContract addresses
BondingCurve: credContract address (dependency for royalty and protocol fee percent lookup)
privilege_assets: UUPS upgrade authority on Cred, PhiFactory, PhiNFT1155 via _authorizeUpgrade միայնOwner
Ownership (Ownable2StepUpgradeable/Ownable2Step) on Cred, PhiFactory, PhiNFT1155, PhiRewards, BondingCurve, CuratorRewardsDistributor
Pause authority on Cred, PhiFactory, PhiNFT1155 (pause/unPause) controlling trading/creation/claiming flows
PhiFactory owner ability to pause/unpause arbitrary art contracts by address or artId (pauseArtContract/unPauseArtContract)
Cred owner ability to change: phiSignerAddress, protocolFeeDestination, protocolFeePercent, phiRewardsAddress, bonding curve whitelist
PhiFactory owner ability to change: phiSignerAddress, protocolFeeDestination, erc1155ArtAddress, phiRewardsAddress, protocolFee (mintProtocolFee), artCreateFee, withdraw() all ETH balance
PhiRewards owner ability to change reward rates and curatorRewardsDistributor
CuratorRewardsDistributor owner ability to change phiRewardsContract and withdrawRoyalty
BondingCurve owner ability to set credContract (affects pricing/fee computations system-wide)
reputation_assets: Cred share positions and supplies (used as social proof / curation reputation)
NFT mint records and soulbound enforcement (user achievement reputation)
EIP-712 nonces and signature-based withdrawal integrity (trust in rewards accounting)
Protocol fee destination and signer trust (phiSignerAddress governs authorization of art/cred creation and signature claims)

system_architecture.inheritance_hierarchy: Cred: Initializable -> UUPSUpgradeable -> Ownable2StepUpgradeable -> PausableUpgradeable (+ ICred). PhiFactory: Initializable -> UUPSUpgradeable -> Ownable2StepUpgradeable -> PausableUpgradeable (+ IPhiFactory). PhiNFT1155: Initializable -> UUPSUpgradeable -> ERC1155SupplyUpgradeable(->ERC1155Upgradeable) -> ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable -> PausableUpgradeable -> Ownable2StepUpgradeable + Claimable + CreatorRoyaltiesControl (+ IPhiNFT1155). PhiRewards: RewardControl(EIP712) + Ownable2Step. CuratorRewardsDistributor: Ownable2Step. BondingCurve: Ownable2Step. Claimable/CreatorRoyaltiesControl/RewardControl are abstract/base modules used by PhiNFT1155 and PhiRewards.
external_dependencies: OpenZeppelin upgradeable: Initializable, UUPSUpgradeable, Ownable2StepUpgradeable, PausableUpgradeable, ERC1155Upgradeable, ERC1155SupplyUpgradeable, ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable
OpenZeppelin non-upgradeable: Ownable, Ownable2Step, IERC165, IERC2981 interfaces
Solady: ECDSA, EIP712, SignatureCheckerLib, SafeTransferLib, LibString, LibClone, LibZip, MerkleProofLib
External protocol interfaces: IBondingCurve, IPhiRewards, IPhiFactory, IPhiNFT1155Ownable, ICred, ICuratorRewardsDistributor
system_architecture.upgrade_patterns: UUPS proxies for Cred, PhiFactory, PhiNFT1155 implementations (initialize() + _authorizeUpgrade onlyOwner). PhiRewards, CuratorRewardsDistributor, BondingCurve appear non-upgradeable (constructor-based). PhiFactory deploys ERC1155 art contracts using Solady LibClone cloneDeterministic from erc1155ArtAddress implementation, then initializes them (not proxy-based per clone).
system_architecture.access_control_structure: Owner-centric control via Ownable2Step/Ownable2StepUpgradeable. No AccessControl roles. Pausable is exposed with external onlyOwner pause/unPause in Cred, PhiFactory, PhiNFT1155. PhiNFT1155 has onlyPhiFactory gating for factory-only minting/art creation. PhiFactory has onlyArtCreator(artId) gating updateArtSettings. Creator royalties update gated by onlyArtCreator(tokenId) (artist or owner).

state_changes: Indirect via this.merkleClaim/this.signatureClaim: arts[artId].numberMinted, artMinted, credMinted
external_calls: Potential downstream calls via _processClaim to art contract

state_changes: Indirect via repeated this.claim calls: arts[*].numberMinted, artMinted, credMinted

upgradeability_surface.notes: UUPSUpgradeable + Ownable2StepUpgradeable + PausableUpgradeable. Custom storage includes mappings and EnumerableMap structs; upgrades must preserve layout. Management functions pause/unPause are exposed. Upgrade authorized by onlyOwner.
UUPSUpgradeable + Ownable2StepUpgradeable + PausableUpgradeable. Uses custom reentrancy guard 'locked' (not OZ) to preserve layout. Owner can withdraw all ETH in contract.

UUPSUpgradeable combined with multiple upgradeable parents (ERC1155SupplyUpgradeable, ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable, PausableUpgradeable, Ownable2StepUpgradeable) plus custom mappings. Deployed as clone instances from PhiFactory (not a proxy), so UUPS functions likely unused operationally, but still present if ever proxied. pause/unPause exposed. Upgrade authorized by onlyOwner.
Constructor-based Ownable; not upgradeable. Inherits RewardControl (EIP712).
